title: Steamy Turkish Sardines Stir-fry
description: A sour and creamy low-carb-friendly dish featuring steam-cooked sardines with a side of aromatic herbs for an unexpected twist on traditional Mediterranean flavors.

ingredients.name: 1 can (400g) of sardines in oil, drained and reserved oil
ingredients.notes: Use a full can for more fish

ingredients.name: Handful of fresh dill leaves
ingredients.notes: About 2-3 sprigs per can of sardines

instructions: Place the drained sardines in a steamer basket over boiling water and steam for about 5 minutes or until just cooked through.
In a small saucepan, mix together lemon juice, minced garlic, dill, unsalted butter, salt, and pepper. Stir well to combine.
Pour the sauce over the steamed sardines in the basket and toss gently with tongs to coat evenly.
Transfer the sardine mixture to a serving bowl, garnish with extra fresh dill sprigs if desired, and serve immediately.
